title: Functional proteomics approaches for the identification of transnitrosylase and denitrosylase targets.
author: Wu C Parrott AM Liu T Beuve A Li H
content: S-EPMC3726571 PMC3726571 Functional proteomics approaches for the identification of transnitrosylase and denitrosylase targets. Protein S-nitrosylation is a dynamic post-translational modification (PTM) of specific cysteines within a target protein. Both proteins and small molecules are known
